mapper.select:
SELECT m.id, m.address_id, m.type, m.cost_date, m.cost, m.remark, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.create_by, m.update_by, m.del_flag, a.name AS address_name FROM bus_maintenance m LEFT JOIN bus_address a ON m.address_id = a.id
m.del_flag = 0 AND a.family_id = #{familyId} AND m.address_id = #{addressId} AND m.type = #{type} AND m.cost_date >= #{costDateStart}::date AND m.cost_date <= #{costDateEnd}::date
ORDER BY m.cost_date DESC
